detail.description:
The ancient behemoths that have long guarded the continent have suddenly gone berserk. Their roars tear through the sky and shake the earth; the elements are thrown into chaos, and calamity sweeps across every corner. The fate of the world now rests on the shoulders of the brave soul who can connect with their spirits and rebuild their bonds—could that person be you?
Master the battlefield in a clash of strategy and adrenaline!
Experience the art of turn-based combat where a single move can turn
detail.developer: Hongdong Guangsheng Network Technology Co., Ltd.
detail.releaseNotes:
Fix known issues
Optimize user experience
